github.releaseNotes:
## 🦕 Jurassic World API Release v${version}

### What's New
- Automated release with release-it
- Improved park management features
- Enhanced security protocols

### 🔧 Technical Updates
- Version bump to ${version}
- Updated Docker image
- Code quality improvements

### 🚀 Deployment
This release is ready for production deployment.

**⚠️ Safety Notice**: All dinosaur containment protocols have been verified.
